from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import *

INPUT_SOURCES_PATH = "abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed/sources/"

sources_df = (
    spark.read
    .format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")   # ✅ tells Spark first row is header
    .load(INPUT_SOURCES_PATH)
)

max_length = sources_df.select(F.max(F.length("abbreviated_title"))).collect()[0][0]
print(max_length)

# =====================
# CONFIG
# =====================
INPUT_JSON_PATH = "abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/doi_tidy_all/"
#INPUT_JSON_PATH = "abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/data/works/*/*.gz"
OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH_1 ="abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/doi_tidy"
OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH_2 ="abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/doi_tidy_topics"

# =====================
# LOAD JSON
# =====================
#works_raw = spark.read.json(INPUT_JSON_PATH).alias("w")
#works_raw = spark.read.option("multiline", "true").json(INPUT_JSON_PATH).alias("w")
#works_raw = spark.read.option("multiline", "true").schema(works_schema).json(INPUT_JSON_PATH)
#works_raw = spark.read.format("delta").load(INPUT_JSON_PATH)
#works_raw.printSchema()

# ---------------------------
# 1. Build doi_tidy (exclude topic_list)
# ---------------------------
columns_to_keep = [
    "DOI_tidy_ID",
    "year", "type", "type_crossref",
    "sources_id", "sources_id_as_stated",
    "issn_l", "issn_l_as_stated",
    "oa_status", "license", "version", "host_type",
    "Is_Article", "Articles",
    "cited_by_count", "cited_works_count"
]

doi_tidy_df = works_raw.select(*[c for c in columns_to_keep if c in works_raw.columns])

# ---------------------------
# 2. Build doi_tidy_topics
# ---------------------------
# Split topic_list into array of topic_and_score
df_topics = works_raw.withColumn(
    "topic_array",
    F.split(F.col("topic_list"), ";")
)

# Explode array -> one row per topic_and_score
df_topics = df_topics.withColumn("topic_and_score", F.explode_outer("topic_array"))

# Remove blanks
df_topics = df_topics.filter(F.col("topic_and_score") != "")

# Split into topic_id and score
df_topics = df_topics.withColumn("topic_id", F.split("topic_and_score", "\\|").getItem(0)) \
                     .withColumn("score", F.split("topic_and_score", "\\|").getItem(1).cast("double"))

# Aggregate: per DOI_tidy_ID and topic_id
doi_tidy_topics_df = (
    df_topics.groupBy("DOI_tidy_ID", "topic_id")
    .agg(
        F.sum("score").alias("score"),
        F.count("*").alias("n")
    )

(
    doi_tidy_df
    .write
    .format("delta")   # Use Delta format
    .mode("overwrite") # Overwrite existing data
    .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH_1)

(
    doi_tidy_topics_df
    .write
    .format("delta")   # Use Delta format
    .mode("overwrite") # Overwrite existing data
    .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH_2)
